name: CORONARY ARTERIES
definition: LAD LAD LCx RCA watershed areas artery that supplies the inferior portion of LV 2nd most common cause of sudden cardiac death among young adults

demographics.Location: on epicardial surface, in atrial / ventricular septum, in myocardium
demographics.Prevalence: 0.3-1.3%; in 4-25% responsible for nontraumatic sudden death in young adults

dominant_finding: forms circle of Vieussens = anastomosis with LAD
distribution: on epicardial surface, in atrial / ventricular septum, in myocardium
discriminating_features: forms circle of Vieussens = anastomosis with LAD
courses along anterior interatrial groove toward superior cavoatrial junction
at cavoatrial junction circling either anteriorly (precaval) / posteriorly (retrocaval) to
penetrates base of posterior interatrial septum at crux
may course beneath endocardium near ostium of coronary sinus + septal isthmus
